raw.subject: Tegeler Wrecker & Crane in Davenport; Something I noticed about your community posts
raw.body:
Hi,

Your post about being 'big enough to handle it, small enough to care' really resonated with me. I love that you're not just a big operation, but you still care about your customers.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential customers who prefer browsing online to book appointments.

I sketched up a simple page idea from what you post on Facebook. It has a services menu, a work gallery, and a prominent call-to-action to book an appointment. You can even see your hours and location right on the page.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/tegeler-wrecker-crane-davenport

This is just a starting point, but I think it could be a great foundation for your online presence. Let's discuss the details of building it out, and I can give you a flat fee for local businesses to get started. Reply or let's schedule a quick call to go over the next steps.
